name: 折刀（★） | 渐变大理石
descriptionEn: This marble-enamel-handled flip knife conceals a small but viciously tapered blade. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated in three colors. The blade is made of many colors, but soon it all looks red
descriptionZh: 这把折叠刀的大理石纹珐琅刀柄中藏着小巧而致命的锥形刀刃。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了三层颜色的糖衣。 刺刀见虹，刺刀见红
